_comment: Curated POE-sourced tab content for the Sheko Ballastpulver IT workbook. Source: Amazon POE Customer Review Insights for the IT 'fibre' niche (niche 3b3e7346..., last updated 2026-06-07), captured by Codex in output/sheko/opportunity-data/2026-06-10_poe_it-fibre_customer-review-insights.json. These are NICHE-level insights (across fibre products, dominated by psyllium/NaturaleBio), not Sheko's own reviews (Sheko has 0 reviews on amazon.it).

rows: Qualità in generale

Impact on star rating (note)
Top positive-impact topics in niche: Regola la digestione (+3.24), Rapporto qualità-prezzo (+0.41). Baking & taste are recurring satisfaction drivers.
